name: sqlite-mcp
description: MCP server for SQLite database operations

tools.name: read_query
tools.description: Execute a SELECT query and return results

tools.name: write_query
tools.description: Execute an INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE query

tools.name: create_table
tools.description: Create a new table in the database

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List all tables in the database

tools.name: describe_table
tools.description: Get schema information for a table

table_name.description: Name of the table to describe
